title: polygala pungens
intro: Polygala pungens, also known as Chinese frog's tongue or Chinese snake root, is a perennial herbaceous plant native to China and other parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, as well as protecting against cardiovascular disease and certain types of cancer. Traditionally, the root and leaves of the plant are prepared for herbal use, often in the form of decoctions or infusions.
